headline: Tampa-based Safepoint files for NYSE IPO as Gulf Coast premiums surge
summary: Investing.com -- Safepoint Holdings Inc., a specialty underwriter of homeowners and commercial insurance, has filed for an initial public offering (IPO) following a period of significant growth in profit and revenue, according to a Friday filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), as reported by Bloomberg.
